narrative: I am detecting a medium-severity Neo4j authentication failure blocking memory writes despite overall health. My inspection reveals five agents lacking versioned prompts: desktop, devops, financial_analyst, pim, and reasoning_methods. These missing prompt versions prevent consistent agent behavior and self-improvement tracking across sessions. I will prioritize resolving the Neo4j authentication issue and implementing versioned prompts for all agents during my next self-improvement cycle.
